description: Add MDI icons for categories and groups, allow any user to create groups with ownership, and let owners edit/manage/delete their groups

userStories.title: Add icon field to Category and Group models
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to store an icon name for categories and groups.
acceptanceCriteria: Add icon CharField(max_length=50, default='mdi-shape-outline', blank=True) to Category model
Add icon CharField(max_length=50, default='mdi-account-group', blank=True) to Group model
Generate and run migration successfully
CategorySerializer includes icon field (read and write)
GroupSerializer includes icon field (read and write)
Tests pass: cd backend && python manage.py test core

userStories.title: Allow any authenticated user to create groups
userStories.description: As a user, I want to create my own groups without needing admin privileges.
acceptanceCriteria: GroupViewSet allows POST (create) for any authenticated user, not just staff
Keep admin-only restriction for list-all (staff sees all, non-staff sees own groups only) — this already works
perform_create() sets created_by=request.user AND auto-adds creator to group.members
Non-staff user POST /api/groups/ with valid data returns 201
New group has creator in members list
Tests pass: cd backend && python manage.py test core

userStories.title: Add IsGroupOwnerOrAdmin permission class
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a permission class that restricts group edits to the owner or staff.
acceptanceCriteria: Create IsGroupOwnerOrAdmin permission class in backend/core/permissions.py
Permission returns True if request.user == group.created_by OR request.user.is_staff
Permission extracts group pk from view kwargs (for ViewSet detail actions) or URL kwargs
Returns False (403) for non-owner non-staff users
Tests pass: cd backend && python manage.py test core

userStories.title: Apply ownership permission to GroupViewSet update and delete
userStories.description: As a group owner, I want to edit and delete my group.
acceptanceCriteria: GroupViewSet uses IsGroupOwnerOrAdmin for update, partial_update, and destroy actions
Non-owner non-staff PATCH /api/groups/{id}/ returns 403
Owner PATCH /api/groups/{id}/ with new name returns 200
Staff PATCH /api/groups/{id}/ returns 200
Owner DELETE /api/groups/{id}/ returns 204
Tests pass: cd backend && python manage.py test core

userStories.title: Allow group owner to manage members
userStories.description: As a group owner, I want to add and remove members from my group.
acceptanceCriteria: GroupMemberView permission changed from IsAdminUser to allow group owner (created_by) OR staff
Owner POST /api/groups/{id}/members/ with valid user_id adds member
Owner DELETE /api/groups/{id}/members/{user_id}/ removes member
Non-owner non-staff POST/DELETE returns 403
Staff can still add/remove members in any group
Tests pass: cd backend && python manage.py test core

userStories.title: Install @mdi/font and create IconPicker component
userStories.description: As a developer, I need an MDI icon library and a reusable icon picker component.
acceptanceCriteria: Install @mdi/font via npm in frontend/
Import @mdi/font/css/materialdesignicons.min.css in main.ts or main.css
Create frontend/src/components/IconPicker.vue
IconPicker has a search input that filters icons by name
IconPicker displays matching icons in a scrollable grid with icon rendered and name on hover/title
IconPicker emits a select event with the chosen icon name (e.g. mdi-home)
Include a curated array of 50-80 common icon names (home, food-apple, car, medical-bag, shopping, airplane, etc.) as the searchable set
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add icon display to dashboard group cards
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see group icons on the dashboard so I can quickly identify my groups.
acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard group cards show the group icon (rendered as <span class='mdi {icon}'>) next to the group name
If no icon set, show default mdi-account-group
Icon sized at 1.25rem and uses var(--color-primary) color
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add group creation modal on dashboard
userStories.description: As a user, I want a Create Group button on the dashboard to create my own groups.
acceptanceCriteria: Create Group button visible on dashboard for all authenticated users
Clicking opens a modal with fields: name (required text input), icon (IconPicker), currency (dropdown from API), default split method (equal/custom dropdown)
Submitting calls POST /api/groups/ and adds the new group to the dashboard list
Modal closes and dashboard refreshes after successful creation
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add group settings — edit name and icon
userStories.description: As a group owner, I want to edit my group's name and icon from the group detail page.
acceptanceCriteria: Group detail view shows a Settings/gear button visible only to owner (created_by == current user) and staff
Clicking opens a settings section or modal with editable name input and IconPicker for icon
Save button calls PATCH /api/groups/{id}/ with updated name and icon
UI updates to reflect new name/icon after save
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add group settings — member management
userStories.description: As a group owner, I want to add and remove members from the group detail page.
acceptanceCriteria: Group settings section shows current member list with remove button next to each member
Add member input field with button — calls POST /api/groups/{id}/members/
Remove button calls DELETE /api/groups/{id}/members/{user_id}/ and removes from list
Owner cannot remove themselves (disabled or hidden remove button for self)
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add group settings — delete group
userStories.description: As a group owner, I want to delete my group with a confirmation dialog.
acceptanceCriteria: Group settings section shows a Delete Group button styled as danger
Clicking shows a confirmation dialog asking the user to confirm deletion
Confirming calls DELETE /api/groups/{id}/ and redirects to dashboard
Cancelling closes the dialog with no action
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add icon picker to admin category management
userStories.description: As an admin, I want to assign icons to categories from the admin view.
acceptanceCriteria: Admin view category creation form includes an IconPicker or icon input
Admin view category edit shows current icon and allows changing it
Category icon saved via API when creating or editing
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Display category icons in expense forms and lists
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see category icons in expense forms and lists for visual clarity.
acceptanceCriteria: Category dropdown in AddExpenseForm and EditExpenseForm shows MDI icon next to category name
Expense list items on group detail page show category icon next to category name
If category has no icon, show default mdi-shape-outline
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
